eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LAW ENFORCEMENT WARNING for the following counties or areas: Garfield, CO; at 05:40 PM ON MAY 21, 2026 Effective until 06:40 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: 7th St & Bennett Ave, Glenwood Springs: There is a law enforcement presence in the area. Please stay inside, lock doors and windows, avoid the area.
